title: Self-Destruction
wikitext:
[[File:Cell_Self-Destruction.gif|thumb|400px|[[Cell (Dragon Ball)|Cell]] detonating himself in an attempt to destroy Earth and kill [[Son Goku]] along with it]]

==Summary==
'''Self-Destruction''' is the ability to detonate oneself in an attempt to kill their foe with the blast. This process is almost invariably fatal to the user, but some characters are capable of surviving their own self-destruction techniques.

==Users==
*[[Chiaotzu]], [[Saibamen]], [[Vegeta (Dragon Ball Z)|Vegeta]], [[Son Goku (Dragon Ball GT)]], [[Cell (Dragon Ball)|Cell]], [[Android 16]], [[Android 17 (Manga)|Android 17]], and [[Android 18 (Manga)|Android 18]] ([[Dragon Ball]])
*[[Deidara]] ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
*Pokémon that can learn "Self-Destruct" or "Explosion" ([[Pokémon]])
*Nitro ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Creeper (Minecraft)|Creeper]] ([[Minecraft]])
*[[Sentry Buster]] ([[Team Fortress]])
*[[YoRHa No.2 Type B]] ([[NieR: Automata]])
